---
title: "In_Class_Ex03b"
format: html
---

```{r}
pacman:: p_load(tidyverse, sf, tmap, httr)
```

```{r}
folder_path <- "data/aspatial/acra"
file_list <- list.files(path=folder_path,
                        pattern="^ACRA*,\\.csv$",full.names=TRUE)

acra_data <-file_list%>%
  map_dfr(read_csv)
```

```{r}
write_rds(acra_data,"data/rds/acra_data.rds")
```
